mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO friend_request
requester_id, receiver_id, request_message, status, processed_at, created_at, updated_at,
#{requesterId}, #{receiverId}, #{requestMessage}, #{status}, #{processedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select: SELECT id, requester_id, receiver_id, request_message, status, processed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM friend_request WHERE status = 0 AND ((requester_id = #{userA} AND receiver_id = #{userB}) OR (requester_id = #{userB} AND receiver_id = #{userA})) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
